# aisw

> Structured documentation index for language models and retrieval systems.

Current version: 0.3.2

## aisw documentation

URL: https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/
Section: overview
Summary: Install and use aisw for account/profile management across Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI.
Source: https://github.com/burakdede/aisw/blob/main/docs/index.md
Headings: Install | Start here | Command summary | Additional references
Common queries: aisw docs | aisw install | aisw quickstart

## Quickstart

URL: https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/quickstart/
Section: getting-started
Summary: Install aisw, initialize, add profiles, and switch accounts.
Source: https://github.com/burakdede/aisw/blob/main/docs/quickstart.md
Headings: 1. Install | 2. Run setup | 3. Add profiles | 4. Switch profiles | 5. Inspect state | 6. Common maintenance | Automation-safe patterns
Common queries: install aisw | quickstart for Claude Code account switching | quickstart for Codex CLI account switching | quickstart for Gemini CLI account switching

## Commands

URL: https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/commands/
Section: reference
Summary: Command and flag reference for aisw.
Source: https://github.com/burakdede/aisw/blob/main/docs/commands.md
Headings: Global flags | At a glance | `aisw init` | `aisw add` | `aisw use` | `aisw list` | `aisw status` | `aisw remove` | `aisw rename` | `aisw backup` | `aisw backup list` | `aisw backup restore` | `aisw uninstall` | `aisw shell-hook` | `aisw doctor` | Script-focused references
Common queries: aisw command reference | aisw add use list status

## Troubleshooting

URL: https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/troubleshooting/
Section: reference
Summary: Common errors and direct fixes.
Source: https://github.com/burakdede/aisw/blob/main/docs/troubleshooting.md
Headings: `tool not installed` | Hook not loaded | Non-interactive failures | Gemini shared state error | Permission errors | Backup restore did not switch active profile | Useful diagnostics | Still blocked?
Common queries: aisw troubleshooting | aisw shell hook not working | aisw tool not found | aisw gemini oauth fail
